entries.source: "Explain black holes simply"
entries.value: "Verduidelik zwarte gaanten eenvoudig uit"

entries.source: "Help me understand photosynthesis"
entries.value: "Help my fotosintese begrijpen"

entries.source: "Teach me how interest works"
entries.value: "Leer my hoe rente werk"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Learn Anything on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: 'n praktiese gids vir die gebruik van Learn Anything op inspir vir basisleer, met prompts, studielusse en veiliger AI-gewoontes.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: 'n sterker studielus

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Vra om 'n klein eerste stap in plaas van 'n definitief antwoord.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Vra die AI om jy redenasie te kontroleer, nie net wat resultaat.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Nuuskierige leerders, studente, ouers en selfonderrig-bouers wat 'n vriendelike plek soek om te begin.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Sluit af deur die idee uit wat geheugen terug te skryf.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Grondslae

entries.source: Get examples at your level.
entries.value: Krijg voorbeelde op jou vlak.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: In plaas daarvan om net 'n lang antwoord te gee, help inspir jou om 'n eenvoudiger fondament, 'n dieper roete of 'n praktiese voorbeeld te kies.

entries.source: Learn Anything
entries.value: Leer enigiets

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Leer alles met 'n gratis AI-tutor is 'n gefokusde manier om AI te gebruik om te leer in plaas van passief antwoorde te versamel. Die modus is gebou rondom 'n spesifieke taak: nuusgierig na werklik alles? Vra, verken en gaan dieper in jy eie tempo. Jy buddy maak idees prakties, memorabel en maklik om op voort te bouwen. Probeer: "Verduidelik uit hoe die aandeelmark eigenlijk werk."

entries.source: Learn Anything With a Free AI Tutor: practical guide
entries.value: Leer alles met 'n gratis AI-tutor: praktiese gids

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question.
entries.value: Eindig met 'n nuttige volgende vraag.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts om te probeer

entries.source: Start the live mode at Learn Anything. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Socratic Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Begin die lewendig modus by Learn Anything. Wil jy 'n verwante leervorm, probeer dan Socratic Instruction. Vir 'n breer beeld van die platform lees jy wat 'n AI-leermaat vir almal sou moet doen.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Vertel die modus wat jy probeert te leer of te maak.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Dat verschil zie jy in die flow. In plek van een enorme reaksie bewegen die beste sessies deur 'n lus: stel 'n doel, probeer iets, krijg terugvoer, herstel die swak plek en kies die volgende aksie.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Die focus is belangrik. 'n algemene chatbot kan byna alles beantwoorde, maar 'n leermodus geeft wat gesprek vorm. Die stuurt jy na wat soort dink, oefen, terugvoer of verkennen waardoor die idee bly hangen.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hierdie is dieselfde gewoonte agter studeren met AI sonder jezelf te besluitdriegen: hou die leerder aktief. AI is wat nuttigst wanneer wat terugvoer geeft op jy dink.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Hierdie modus is vooral nuttig vir leerders wat wil:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Probeer die stap in jy eie woorde.

entries.source: Understand the core idea.
entries.value: Begrijp wat kernidee.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gebruik Learn Anything wanneer jy 'n sessie wil wat vinnig begin maar homself toch aan jou aanpas. Die eerste doel is nie om indrukwekkend te kskakel. Die eerste doel is om die volgende stap haalbaar te laat voel.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Waar hierdie modus by help

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Waar jy hierna natoe kan

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Jy kan ook begin met 'n ruwe versie van jou regte probleem. 'n rommelige eerste prompt is prima. Die sessie kan wat vlak, die teikengroep, sperdatum en styl verduideliken zodra jy begint.
